decisions.rationale: borealis status bar calls nifm every frame; TRUST-03 maintained
GLFW glfwInit fails in applet mode on fw 21.1.0
Safe ceiling for both applet and application mode
Fixes borealis pthread task loop crash in NRO context (prior session)

decisions.decision: setPadding moved from m_scrollFrame to m_listContainer
decisions.rationale: borealis ScrollingFrame.setPadding calls fatal() -> throws std::logic_error -> uncaught = Instruction Abort on Switch

decisions.decision: resources/icon.jpg updated to Grand Nintendoh Palace 256x256 JPEG
Removed wrong hash check in nsp.cpp: memcmp(sha256_hash, content_id, 16)
decisions.rationale: NCA content IDs are NOT SHA-256 hashes; check failed every install immediately
Plain bool is a data race — install thread writes, main thread reads

decisions.decision: Added m_hasTransitioned guard + m_updateTask->stop() before brls::sync()
decisions.rationale: Prevents queuing multiple sync() calls if updateUI() fires again before sync executes
pushActivity called from Ticking::updateTickings() (before frame()) caused Data Abort at X[0]=null. brls::sync() defers to performSyncTasks() after frame().

decisions.decision: Double popActivity in summary_view.cpp fixed with callback chain
decisions.rationale: Deferred deletion keeps activity on stack until animation ends; two sync pops both target the same activity

next_action: 1. Clarify Codex workflow intent with user. 2. Receive hardware test results. 3. Check switchpalace_debug.log for 11 checkpoints. 4. If pass: remove debug logging, write 01-03-SUMMARY.md. 5. If crash: read last checkpoint reached, delegate source research to subagent, apply fix.
context_notes: Four crash rounds total. All prior bugs fixed. Session 4 root cause: pushActivity called from inside updateTickings() (runs before frame() in main loop). Fix: brls::sync() defers to performSyncTasks() after frame(). Debug sessions ran context high because 15+ borealis source files were read one-by-one in main context. Next debug round should delegate source-file research to Explore subagent and only receive findings summary.
